clause_text: All data uploaded to the Platform shall be stored in the Provider's data centers located in Ireland and the United States.
risk_reason: Cross-border transfer of personal data without legal basis violates PDPL Arts. 29-30; no mention of SDAIA authorization or adequacy determination.
saudi_legal_note: المادتان 29-30 من نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية تحظران نقل البيانات خارج المملكة إلا بأساس قانوني محدد — لا يوجد في هذا البند ما يُثبت توافر أي أساس قانوني.
recommended_revision: Add a data residency clause requiring storage within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; or specify the legal basis (SDAIA authorization or adequacy decision) for any cross-border transfer.

clause_text: The Provider's total aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed USD five hundred (USD 500).
risk_reason: A USD 500 liability cap on a contract worth millions of SAR is functionally equivalent to a full exemption from liability and is grossly disproportionate to the contract value.
saudi_legal_note: حد مسؤولية بـ 500 دولار أمريكي مقابل عقد بملايين الريالات يُشبه الإعفاء الكامل من المسؤولية — قد تعدّه المحاكم السعودية شرطًا تعسفيًا يُخلّ بالتوازن العقدي.
recommended_revision: Revise the liability cap to a reasonable multiple of annual fees paid (e.g. 12 months of fees or 1x the annual contract value).
related_regulation: Saudi Civil Transactions Law (Royal Decree M/191 1444H)

clause_text: The Provider reserves the right to suspend access to the Platform immediately and without prior notice at its sole discretion.
risk_reason: Unilateral suspension without notice or cure period creates severe operational risk and may itself constitute a breach of the Provider's service obligations.
saudi_legal_note: حق الإيقاف الفوري دون إشعار يُخلّ بمبدأ حسن النية في تنفيذ العقود — يُنصح بالتفاوض على مهلة إشعار مع تحديد الأسباب المبررة للإيقاف.
recommended_revision: Amend to: suspension only upon 10 business days prior written notice except in cases of security breach or force majeure; include a cure period for non-payment.
related_regulation: Saudi Civil Transactions Law (Royal Decree M/191 1444H)

clause_text: The Provider shall use commercially reasonable efforts to ensure Platform availability.
risk_reason: 'Commercially reasonable efforts' is undefined and provides no measurable service level commitment or remedy mechanism for downtime.
saudi_legal_note: غياب SLA محدد يجعل مطالبة العميل بالتعويض عسيرة أمام المحاكم السعودية — يجب تحديد نسبة التوافر وآلية التعويض.
recommended_revision: Add a Service Level Annex specifying: uptime commitment (e.g. 99.5%); measurement methodology; remedies for downtime (service credits); and scheduled maintenance windows.
related_regulation: Saudi Civil Transactions Law (Royal Decree M/191 1444H)
